entities.description: Triticum turgidum var. durum L., a species of wheat used for plant regeneration studies

entities.description: A high regeneration line of spring bread wheat

entities.name: MEXICALI
entities.description: An elite variety of durum wheat

entities.name: CALLUS INDUCTION
entities.description: The process of inducing the formation of an unorganized mass of cells called callus

entities.name: PLANT REGENERATION
entities.description: The process of developing a whole plant from callus or other explants

entities.name: CALLUS YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of callus produced during the induction process

entities.name: 2,4-DICHLOROPHENOXYACETIC ACID
entities.description: A synthetic auxin used to stimulate callus growth

entities.name: NACL
entities.description: Sodium chloride used to manipulate callus induction and regeneration

entities.name: E3 INDUCTION MEDIUM
entities.description: A specific culture medium consisting of MS medium, 2,4-D, sucrose, and Bacto agar

entities.name: MURASHIGE AND SKOOG MEDIUM
entities.description: A widely used basal medium for plant tissue culture

entities.name: IMMATURE EMBRYO CULTURE
entities.description: The process of culturing immature embryos to initiate callus
